articles.title: Why fixing 'Direct/None' alone won't reduce GA4's 'unknown traffic'
articles.description: If you've enforced UTM tagging to reduce GA4 Direct / (none) but the total 'unknown traffic' barely moved, you're not alone. GA4 reports actually contain four distinct categories — (not set), Direct / (none), Unassigned, and (other). Each is generated at a different stage and needs a different fix.
